```{r}
#| label: modality-setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})
options(warn = 2)                                    # promote any chunk warning to a render error (gate-critical)
targets::tar_source()                                # constants, plot theme + modality figure helpers
targets::tar_load(modality_scatter_figures)          # compact logFC pairs + functional group scores
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())

msf <- modality_scatter_figures
```

<h2 class="figure-heading">Figure 6</h2>

```{r}
#| label: plot-geomx-sample-heatmap
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 9
#| fig-alt: "GeoMx AOI track atlas with AOI columns clustered by five displayed DAM marker-gene expression tracks and branch-ordered by mean DAM z-score, with genotype plus shared no-versus-yes tau and amyloid tracks above B2m, Apoe, Ctsd, Tyrobp, and Trem2; no spatial, QC, replicate, ROI, or expression heatmap tracks are displayed."
geomx_sample_heatmap_plot(msf$descriptive$GeoMx$sample_heatmap)
```

<h2 class="figure-heading">Figure 7</h2>

```{r}
#| label: plot-modality-proteome-landscape
#| fig-width: 13.2
#| fig-height: 8.8
#| fig-alt: "Bulk proteome figure with a genotype-coloured sample PCA and a protein differential-abundance volcano plot for NLGF_P301S versus P301S."
proteome_modality_plot(msf$descriptive$Proteome, title = msf$panels$Proteome$title)
```

<h2 class="figure-heading">Figure 8</h2>

```{r}
#| label: plot-modality-phospho-landscape
#| fig-width: 13.4
#| fig-height: 9.8
#| fig-alt: "Bulk phosphoproteome figure with a phosphosite differential-abundance volcano plot and a genotype-grouped heatmap of top phosphosite abundances across runs."
phospho_modality_plot(msf$descriptive$Phospho, title = NULL)
```

<h2 class="figure-heading">Figure 9</h2>

```{r}
#| label: plot-modality-amyloid-effect
#| fig-width: 13.9
#| fig-height: 16.8
#| fig-alt: "Four scatter plots, one per method, each comparing the amyloid log fold change between the two tau backgrounds on a shared square coordinate scale; a large text note labels the dotted threshold bands as absolute off-diagonal distance |x-y| greater than or equal to 2 log2FC, with text labels capped for readability, no GeoMx threshold-passing labels, and phosphoproteomics collapsed to parent proteins."
label_cap <- msf$provenance$scatter_label_cap %||% 24L
scatter_lim <- max(vapply(msf$order, function(m) {
  d <- msf$panels[[m]]$data
  max(abs(c(d$x[is.finite(d$x)], d$y[is.finite(d$y)])), na.rm = TRUE)
}, numeric(1)))
scatter_lim <- if (is.finite(scatter_lim) && scatter_lim > 0) scatter_lim else 1
panels <- lapply(msf$order, function(m) {
  modality_interaction_scatter(msf$panels[[m]]$data, title = msf$panels[[m]]$title,
                               n_label = label_cap, xy_lim = scatter_lim)
})
wrap_plots(panels, ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "threshold: |x-y| >= 2 log2FC",
    theme = ggplot2::theme(
      plot.caption = ggplot2::element_text(
        size = tau_report_base_size * 1.2,
        hjust = 0.5,
        colour = "#333333",
        margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 8)
      )
    )
  )
```

<h2 class="figure-heading">Figure 10</h2>

```{r}
#| label: plot-modality-functional-scores
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 13.5
#| fig-alt: "Faceted dumbbell plots show categorized modality-specific functional groups for off-diagonal genes or proteins after removing uncategorized fallback buckets and small aggregate differences; paired points for aggregate NLGF_MAPTKI and NLGF_P301S amyloid responses are connected by a segment coloured by log2FC difference."
functional_group_score_plot(msf$groups$summary, title = "Off-diagonal functional groups")
```
